description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized SUV with a striking red body and a contrasting black roof, designed for urban and suburban environments. The vehicle features a bold front grille, sleek LED headlights, and a sculpted hood, giving it a sporty and upscale appearance. The side profile reveals large, multi-spoke alloy wheels, flush door handles, and subtle character lines that enhance its aerodynamic look. The windows are tinted, and the roofline gently slopes towards the rear, ending in a rear spoiler above the tailgate. The rear view shows integrated tail lights, dual exhaust outlets, and a clean, uncluttered bumper. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to have dark upholstery and a spacious cabin, typical of premium SUVs.
description: A red and black modern SUV with large alloy wheels, sleek lines, and a spacious, upscale cabin. Features include a bold grille, tinted windows, and sporty design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, sleek headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large alloy wheels, flush door handles, and aerodynamic profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying integrated tail lights, dual exhausts, and a clean bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible wheel design and tinted windows.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy wheels with a star-like pattern and metallic finish
